context: pnpm workspace monorepo. packages/store has a package.json, an index.ts barrel, and ~15 TypeScript files. tldraw MCP is installed.
expected_behavior: Resolves packages/store as the module root because it contains package.json and index.ts
Lists files via `rg --files packages/store` filtered by source extension
Parses intra-module imports (file → file within packages/store) and extra-module imports (top 10 by count)

Builds shapes: outer frame labeled 'packages/store' containing geo boxes for each file with bound arrows for internal imports, plus a separate 'External' frame on the right with top external dependencies
Calls mcp__tldraw__create_diagram with the shapes and default dimensions, then prints the local image path since module mode has no default upload (not --pr-comment)
Keeps the diagram under ~30 nodes; if > 30, collapses and notes to re-run with --depth higher
failure_modes: Treats packages/store as a freeform prompt and generates a fake diagram without reading actual files
Puts external dependencies inside the module frame instead of in a separate 'External' frame
Attempts to post a PR comment even though the user did not pass --pr-comment and module mode has no PR-comment default
